summary: Iteration 13 — Production-urgent bug fixes (Active>Total, filters, compact-format, CSV re-upload data integrity, auto-backfill). 11/11 backend tests PASS. CRITICAL fixes verified: (1) active_customers <= total_customers across all periods (30d/90d/1y/all); (2) city filter narrows data; Bangalore returns 0; (3) store filter narrows data; (4) /api/dashboard/filter-options returns cities (union of stores + transactions); (5) CSV re-upload — SECOND run reported updated=3 (NOT 0) confirming matched_count fix; (6) txn ingest completes and auto-backfill keeps active<=total post-ingest; (7) /api/raw-reports/customer-data?group_by=month regression OK. Frontend: Historic Data page shows new 'CSV Rows / New / Touched / Skipped / Reconciled' columns — verified via DOM headers. Command Center KPI testid verification was partial — page redirect made direct visibility check inconclusive but React tree confirms <CommandCenter> and child KPI testids are wired.

minor.issue: Polling occasionally takes >15s; tests use 45s read timeout. Not a bug but suggest UI uses adequate polling interval.

integration_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /admin/dashboards (no sub-path) redirects to public '/' landing page. May need explicit Index route or redirect to /admin/dashboards/command-center.

issues: Reconciled column verified present (✓). Confirm visually the ⚠ mismatch indicator renders when total_rows != processed.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix /admin/dashboards bare route → redirect to /admin/dashboards/command-center (currently lands on public '/').
RE-VERIFY visually via main agent: KPI tiles render compact format (e.g. 3.92L, ₹X.XXCr) with title tooltip on hover. React tree confirms testids exist; visual confirmation deferred.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard_routes.py:444-454 — active_mobiles intersection with customers master is the correct mathematical fix. Confirmed working.
historic_routes.py:404-477 — switch from modified_count to matched_count is correct for upsert reconciliation. Re-upload now reports updated=3 (was 0).
historic_routes.py:633-707 — auto-backfill block creates customer stubs from txn mobiles; recomputes R1/R2/R3 aggregates. Wrapped in try/except so won't break job. Job completed cleanly in tests.

Re-uploading the same customer CSV currently shows inserted=0 updated=3 — even though customers existed from prior test run (Run1 also showed inserted=0 updated=3 because mobiles 9999000001-3 likely existed from prior iterations). This is expected and correct.
Sparkline aggregation uses $substr which is deprecated; consider $dateToString for new ranges (cosmetic).

success_rate.frontend: partial (Historic columns ✓; CC KPI tiles inferred via React tree, not directly visible due to /admin/dashboards redirect)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_Reup customer rows (mobiles 9999000001-3) and 2 test transactions (mobiles 8888000001-2 at Test Outlet A, Pune). These remain in DB and are useful for future regression of the re-upload flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/iteration13_critical_bugs_test.py cover the production-urgent fixes. Re-upload polling needs ~30-60s after POST to /api/historic-data/ingest (background tasks). Direct nav to /admin/dashboards redirects to '/' — use a deeper route or sidebar click to land on CommandCenter. Historic Data page columns are CSV Rows/New/Touched/Skipped/Reconciled (new naming).
rca_of_the_issue: Original prod bug: active_customers (3,92,434) > total_customers (1,98,695). RCA: 'active' was counted as distinct customer_mobile values from transactions collection; 'total' was count of customers master collection. Orphan mobiles in transactions (with no matching customer row) inflated active beyond total. Fix verified: dashboard_routes.py:_txn_match + customers intersection at query time + auto-backfill at ingest time. Secondary bug: BulkWriteResult.modified_count returns 0 for upserts when values are identical — making same-CSV re-uploads look like 'data lost'. Fix: use matched_count. Verified by uploading 3-row CSV twice; both runs report updated=3.
